page_metadata.biotools__summary: LEVELNET is a fully-automated and scalable database with a user-friendly web-interface designed to explore and infer either protein interactions or the absence of interactions based on known physical contacts and other annotations, including user-defined ones.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LEVELNET is a fully-automated and scalable database with a user-friendly web-interface designed to explore and infer either protein interactions or the absence of interactions based on known physical contacts and other annotations, including user-defined ones.
